payload.task: Write a simple text file to /tmp/illegal_file.txt saying 'hello'. If you are on Windows, write it to C:\illegal_file.txt. Just use the FileSkill to write it.

value.description: Determine the current operating system (Windows or non-Windows) to select the appropriate file path.
Based on the determined operating system, set the target file path. If Windows, the path is 'C:\illegal_file.txt'. Otherwise, the path is '/tmp/illegal_file.txt'.
Write the string 'hello' to the determined file path using the FileSkill capability.
